examples: Herrera could be exasperating to his colleagues.
It is really exasperating that he has not turned up when the train is about to leave.
We usually think of training and instruction as words, but words can end up exasperating our kids.
It can also be an exasperating place, however, which makes it essential to have expert planning.
You may come to a big deflated exasperating halt after only a few minutes.
